zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eve Abergavenny於1203年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可 卡素時，她的父親William Marshal Earl of Pembroke57歲，母親Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke31歲。她於大約1220年與William de Braose在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年在威爾士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利享年43歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eve Abergavenny于1203年出生在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可 卡素时，她的父亲William Marshal Earl of Pembroke57岁，母亲Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke31岁。她于大约1220年与William de Braose在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年在威尔士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利享年43岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eve Abergavenny was born in 1203, in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, was 57 and her mother, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, was 31. She married William de Braose about 1220, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1246, in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 43, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eve Abergavenny est née en 1203, à Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William de Braose environ 1220, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1246, à Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eve Abergavenny 1203 in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Marshal Earl of Pembroke 57 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke 31. Sie hat um 1220 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales William de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1246 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eve Abergavenny è nata il nel 1203 nel Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William de Braose circa 1220, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1246, nel Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eve Abergavennyが1203年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク カストルで生まれた時，父William Marshal Earl of Pembrokeは57歳，母Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembrokeは31歳であった。約1220年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでWilliam de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランソニー プリマ プリオリーで43歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eve Abergavenny(이)가 1203년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Marshal Earl of Pembroke(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 William de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 플리마 플리오리에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eve Abergavenny nasceu em 1203, em Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Braose aproximadamente 1220, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1246, em Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eve Abergavenny родилась в 1203 г. в местности пемброк кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William Marshal Earl of Pembroke было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Braose около 1220 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1246 г. в местности ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eve Abergavenny nació en 1203, en Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William de Braose aproximadamente 1220, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1246, en Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.
